title: Editor Verdict
description: The cold-reader/editor's structured judgment of a draft. Replaces 'grep the file for the word pass': the LLM judgment stays fuzzy, but its OUTPUT is structured so the orchestrator can gate on it programmatically and the reviser can fix only located blockers.

blockers.description: Located problems that must be fixed. When verdict is 'revise' this should be non-empty.

where.description: Quote or position of the problem span.

keepers.description: Passages worth keeping; empty list is itself a red flag.
